mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_TRANSPORT ( ORG_ID, TRX_TYPE, IO_TYPE, REQ_RES_TYPE, GW_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.orgId}, #{dto.trxType}, #{dto.ioType}, #{dto.reqResType}, #{dto.gwId} )
mapper.sql: t.ORG_ID AS orgId, t.TRX_TYPE AS trxType, t.IO_TYPE AS ioType, t.REQ_RES_TYPE AS reqResType, t.GW_ID AS gwId
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.TRX_TYPE AS trxType, NVL( c.CODE_NAME, CASE t.TRX_TYPE WHEN '1' THEN 'ONLINE' WHEN '2' THEN 'BATCH' WHEN '3' THEN 'ASYNC' WHEN '4' THEN 'ASYNC 비온라인' WHEN '5' THEN '전문변환' WHEN '6' THEN 'POS' WHEN '7' THEN 'FHM' WHEN '8' THEN 'RETRY' ELSE t.TRX_TYPE END ) AS trxTypeName FROM FWK_TRANSPORT t LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON c.CODE = t.TRX_TYPE AND c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'TRX_TYPE' ORDER BY t.TRX_TYPE
